title: Subject : Acknowledgement of letters/representations received from Trade / Associations in the Customs.- Circular No.65/1996-Customs, dated 24.12.1996
description: Subject : Acknowledgement of letters/representations received from Trade / Associations in the Customs.- Circular No.65/1996-Customs, dated 24.12.1996
text: Circular No. 65/96 dated 24/12/96 F.No. 443/1/95- Cus. IV Government of India Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue Central Board of Excise & Customs, New Delhi Subject : Acknowledgement of letters/representations received from Trade / Associations in the Customs I am directed to refer to the decision taken in 25th Meeting of Customs and Central Excise Advisory Council on the above subject and in request that all letters/ representations received from the trade/ associations in the Board should be acknowledged and replied. A proforma of acknowledgment is enclosed1 for adoption. Sd/- (Vijay Kumar) Under Secretary to the Govt. of India -- 1 of 1 --
